title: ImageLib
description: Library for loading and using images from the internet
body:
This is a library that can be used to load and use images from the internet. Everything you need is url.

This is an example of what this mod can:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/x0S2u9rCm-A" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
1. Loading static images (png, jpeg, etc.)
2. Loading gifs
3. Resizing image/gif to fit specific area with saving proportions
